title: AIventure: Vibe Coding Journey
summary: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler game built on Angular and Phaser.js that teaches developers about Gen AI through interactive gameplay. It demonstrates vibe coding and agentic behaviors using Gemma 4, with multiple model-serving options including local inference via Transformers.js, Ollama, or LM Studio, as well as cloud routing to Gemini API.
writeup: The video covers AIventure, an open source retro dungeon crawler built on Angular and Phaser.js that teaches Gen AI concepts through interactive gameplay. It demonstrates vibe coding and agentic behaviors using Gemma 4, with several model-serving options: local inference via Transformers.js, Ollama, or LM Studio, plus cloud routing to the Gemini API. The takeaway is a concrete example of pairing in-browser game mechanics with flexible model loading and tool use, showing how the same application can run against local or hosted models.
